[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100000000 2
1 0010010000 2
2 1001100001 4
3 0011010111 6
4 1100101010 5
5 0100001000 2
6 0001111010 5
7 1011001010 5

01 10 0001001010 3
12 21 1001000000 2
23 32 0000010000 1
34 43 0000000000 a
45 54 0001000001 2
56 65 0000000010 1
67 76 0100001000 2 match 5
70 07 0000001000 1

02 20 0001010000 2
13 31 0010000000 1
24 42 1001000000 2
35 53 0010010000 2 match 1
46 64 1000100000 2
57 75 0000000000 a
60 06 0000101010 3
71 17 0000001000 1

03 30 0000010000 1
14 41 1001000000 2
25 52 0001010000 2
36 63 0000000000 a
47 74 0000000000 a
50 05 0001010010 3
61 16 1000001010 3
72 27 0100000000 1

04 40 0001100000 2
15 51 0011000010 3
26 62 1100000000 2 match 0
37 73 0000000000 a
